From POS perspective,

Add a group for Card Installation Reference "HEYMARRY LOYALTY"

Make Sure the Rewards are same as in HM, but with a prefix "HM_"
    like 
    - "10% off" in HM, will look like "HM 10% off"
    - "Free 710 Labs - Black Mamba #6 - Live Rosin Pod - Tier 2 - 1g" -> "HM Free 710 Labs - Black Mamba #6 - Live Rosin Pod - Tier 2 - 1g"

Available points and rewards are visible in customer notes.
like
```
    --- DO NOT EDIT
    POINTS - 169
    [10$ off] - 50
    [60% off] - 100
    [Free 710 Labs - Black Mamba #6 - Live Rosin Pod - Tier 2 - 1g] - 200
    --- DO NOT EDIT
```

Please DO NOT edit this note, if you need to add notes to a customer you can add notes before this.
like
```
    This customer visits often, be polite.
    We give him extra discounts!
    --- DO NOT EDIT
    POINTS - 169
    [10$ off] - 50
    [60% off] - 100
    [Free 710 Labs - Black Mamba #6 - Live Rosin Pod - Tier 2 - 1g] - 200
    --- DO NOT EDIT
```

Any note within the --- DO NOT EDIT tag might get overidden, be careful!
